docs.text: microscopemetrics-schema A schema for microscope-metrics, a python package for microscope QC URI: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema Name: microscopemetrics-schema Classes Class Description ChannelSeries A series whose values represent channel Color A color as defined by RGB values and an optional alpha value Column A column Comment A comment Experimenter The person that performed the experiment or developed the protocol KeyValues A collection of key-value pairs ArgolightBDistanceKeyValues None ArgolightBIntensityKeyValues None ArgolightEKeyValues None FieldIlluminationKeyValues None PSFBeadsKeyMeasurements None MetaObject None MetricsInput An abstract class for analysis inputs ArgolightBInput None ArgolightEInput None FieldIlluminationInput None PSFBeadsInput None MetricsOutput An abstract class for analysis outputs ArgolightBOutput None ArgolightEOutput None FieldIlluminationOutput None PSFBeadsOutput None NamedObject An object with a name and a description Channel A image channel MetricsDataset A base object on which microscope-metrics runs the analysis ArgolightBDataset An Argolight sample pattern B dataset. This pattern consists of an array of circles ArgolightEDataset An Argolight sample pattern E dataset. It contains resolution data on the axis indicated: - axis 1 = Y resolution = lines along X axis - axis 2 = X resolution = lines along Y axis FieldIlluminationDataset A field illumination dataset PSFBeadsDataset A PSF beads dataset MetricsObject A base object for all microscope-metrics objects Device A base object for all microscope-metrics devices Microscope A microscope Image A base object for all microscope-metrics images ImageAsNumpy An image as a numpy array in TZYXC order ImageInline A base object for all microscope-metrics images that are stored as arrays in line Image2D A 2D image in YX order Image5D A 5D image in TZYXC order ImageMask A base object for all microscope-metrics masks Table A table TableAsDict A table inlined in a metrics dataset TableAsPandasDF A table as a Pandas DataFrame Protocol Set of instructions for preparing and imaging a sample Sample A sample is a standard physical object that is imaged by a microscope Roi A ROI (Region Of Interest). Collection of shapes and an image to which they are applied RoiGeometricCenters Point ROIs marking the geometric center of detected objects RoiMassCenters Point ROIs marking the center of mass of detected objects RoiMeasurements ROIs delimiting where measurements were performed. RoiProfiles line ROIs where profiles were computed. Shape A shape Ellipse An ellipse as defined by x, y coordinates and x and y radii Line A line as defined by x1, y1, x2, y2 coordinates Mask A mask as defined by a boolean image Point A point as defined by x and y coordinates Polygon A polygon as defined by a series of vertexes and a boolean to indicate if closed or not Rectangle A rectangle as defined by x, y coordinates and width, height Tag A tag TimeSeries A series whose values represent time Vertex A vertex as defined by x and y coordinates Slots Slot Description acquisition_datetime The datetime of the acquisition alpha The alpha value of the color (optional) analyzed_bead_centroids The centroids of the beads that have been analyzed argolight_b_image Input parameter: image of the argolight b pattern provided as a 5D numpy bead nr_of_spots Number of argolight spots detected for each channel orcid The ORCID of the experimenter orientation_axis Axis along which resolution is being measured output peak_height_A Height of peaks_rois ROIs of the peaks found in the argolight images processed Has the dataset been processed by microscope-metrics processing_datetime The datetime of the processing by microscope-metrics docs.text: A schema for microscope-metrics, a python package for microscope QC URI: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema Name: microscopemetrics-schema
docs.title: microscopemetrics-schema

docs.text: Class Description ChannelSeries A series whose values represent channel Color A color as defined by RGB values and an optional alpha value Column A column Comment A comment Experimenter The person that performed the experiment or developed the protocol KeyValues A collection of key-value pairs ArgolightBDistanceKeyValues None ArgolightBIntensityKeyValues None ArgolightEKeyValues None FieldIlluminationKeyValues None PSFBeadsKeyMeasurements None MetaObject None MetricsInput An abstract class for analysis inputs ArgolightBInput None ArgolightEInput None FieldIlluminationInput None PSFBeadsInput None MetricsOutput An abstract class for analysis outputs ArgolightBOutput None ArgolightEOutput None FieldIlluminationOutput None PSFBeadsOutput None NamedObject An object with a name and a description Channel A image channel MetricsDataset A base object on which microscope-metrics runs the analysis ArgolightBDataset An Argolight sample pattern B dataset. This pattern consists of an array of circles ArgolightEDataset An Argolight sample pattern E dataset. It contains resolution data on the axis indicated: - axis 1 = Y resolution = lines along X axis - axis 2 = X resolution = lines along Y axis FieldIlluminationDataset A field illumination dataset PSFBeadsDataset A PSF beads dataset MetricsObject A base object for all microscope-metrics objects Device A base object for all microscope-metrics devices Microscope A microscope Image A base object for all microscope-metrics images ImageAsNumpy An image as a numpy array in TZYXC order ImageInline A base object for all microscope-metrics images that are stored as arrays in line Image2D A 2D image in YX order Image5D A 5D image in TZYXC order ImageMask A base object for all microscope-metrics masks Table A table TableAsDict A table inlined in a metrics dataset TableAsPandasDF A table as a Pandas DataFrame Protocol Set of instructions for preparing and imaging a sample Sample A sample is a standard physical object that is imaged by a microscope Roi A ROI (Region Of Interest). Collection of shapes and an image to which they are applied RoiGeometricCenters Point ROIs marking the geometric center of detected objects RoiMassCenters Point ROIs marking the center of mass of detected objects RoiMeasurements ROIs delimiting where measurements were performed. RoiProfiles line ROIs where profiles were computed. Shape A shape Ellipse An ellipse as defined by x, y coordinates and x and y radii Line A line as defined by x1, y1, x2, y2 coordinates Mask A mask as defined by a boolean image Point A point as defined by x and y coordinates Polygon A polygon as defined by a series of vertexes and a boolean to indicate if closed or not Rectangle A rectangle as defined by x, y coordinates and width, height Tag A tag TimeSeries A series whose values represent time Vertex A vertex as defined by x and y coordinates

While the analysis accepts multiple channels, the T and Z dimensions are expected to be 1.' from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false alias: field_illumination_image owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - FieldIlluminationInput range: ImageAsNumpy required: true inlined: true bit_depth: name: bit_depth description: Detector bit depth from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false alias: bit_depth owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - ArgolightBInput - ArgolightEInput - PSFBeadsInput - FieldIlluminationInput range: integer minimum_value: 1 maximum_value: 64 saturation_threshold: name: saturation_threshold description: Tolerated saturation threshold. If the amount of saturated pixels is above this threshold, the image is considered as saturated and the analysis is not performed. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false ifabsent: float(0.01) alias: saturation_threshold owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - ArgolightBInput - ArgolightEInput - PSFBeadsInput - FieldIlluminationInput range: float required: true minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 corner_fraction: name: corner_fraction description: 'Input parameter: the proportion of the image to be considered as corner or center' from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false ifabsent: float(0.1) alias: corner_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - FieldIlluminationInput range: float required: true minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 0 sigma: name: sigma description: 'Input parameter: the sigma for the smoothing gaussian filter to be applied prior to analysis' from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false ifabsent: float(5.0) alias: sigma owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - FieldIlluminationInput range: float required: true minimum_value: 2 maximum_value: 8 intensity_map_size: name: intensity_map_size description: 'Input parameter: the size of the output intensity map in pixels' from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: false ifabsent: int(64) alias: intensity_map_size owner: FieldIlluminationInput domain_of: - FieldIlluminationInput range: integer required: true minimum_value: 32 maximum_value: 512

center_region_intensity_fraction: name: center_region_intensity_fraction description: The fraction of the upper intensity range occupied by the center of illumination region. That is, a value of 0.1 means that the center of illumination occupies the top 10% of the intensity range. microscope-metrics tries to adapt the threshold of this intensity so that the area occupied is not too large. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: center_region_intensity_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 center_region_area_fraction: name: center_region_area_fraction description: The fraction of the area occupied by the center of illumination region. If the centre upper intensity fraction is 0.1, that means that the center of illumination occupies 10% of the area of the image. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: center_region_area_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 centroid_weighted_y: name: centroid_weighted_y description: The y coordinate of the center of mass of the center of illumination region. Relative to the image size along that axis. -1.0 is upper edge, 0.0 is center and 1.0 is lower edge. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: centroid_weighted_y_relative owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: -1 maximum_value: 1 centroid_weighted_x: name: centroid_weighted_x description: The x coordinate of the center of mass of the center of illumination region. docs.text: Slot: center_region_intensity_fraction The fraction of the upper intensity range occupied by the center of illumination region. That is, a value of 0.1 means that the center of illumination occupies the top 10% of the intensity range. microscope-metrics tries to adapt the threshold of this intensity so that the area occupied is not too large. URI: microscopemetrics_schema:center_region_intensity_fraction Applicable Classes Name Description Modifies Slot FieldIlluminationKeyValues no Properties Range: Float Multivalued: True Minimum Value: 0 Maximum Value: 1 Identifier and Mapping Information Schema Source from schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema LinkML Source name: center_region_intensity_fraction description: The fraction of the upper intensity range occupied by the center of illumination region. docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot NamedObject An object with a name and a description no ArgolightBDataset An Argolight sample pattern B dataset no ArgolightEDataset An Argolight sample pattern E dataset no MetricsObject A base object for all microscope-metrics objects no Device A base object for all microscope-metrics devices no Microscope A microscope no Sample A sample is a standard physical object that is imaged by a microscope no Protocol Set of instructions for preparing and imaging a sample no Experimenter The person that performed the experiment or developed the protocol no MetricsDataset A base object on which microscope-metrics runs the analysis no Image A base object for all microscope-metrics images no ImageAsNumpy An image as a numpy array in TZYXC order no ImageInline A base object for all microscope-metrics images that are stored as arrays in ... no ImageMask A base object for all microscope-metrics masks no Image2D A 2D image in YX order no Image5D A 5D image in TZYXC order no Channel A image channel no Table A table no TableAsPandasDF A table as a Pandas DataFrame no TableAsDict A table inlined in a metrics dataset no Column A column no PSFBeadsDataset A PSF beads dataset no FieldIlluminationDataset A field illumination dataset no
